clauses.text: Read the task packet, current branch state, nearby docs, and relevant code before editing.
clauses.validation_note: Receipt consumers can require reviewable task and source context evidence when the adapter exposes it.

clauses.text: Keep one lane to one packet and one ownership boundary with minimal reversible diffs.
clauses.validation_note: Receipt consumers can compare changed-file facts, lane id, and packet ownership.

clauses.text: Report exact verification commands and exact pass/fail output, or record why verification cannot run.
clauses.validation_note: Receipt consumers should fail closed when required verification evidence is absent.

clauses.text: No destructive git commands, secrets, production systems, paid cloud resources, arbitrary shell strings, worker launch, or assurance upgrade unless the packet grants that authority and the receipt records it.
clauses.validation_note: Shell-lane launch receipts must keep shell=false, argv allowlists, launches_agents=false, calls_live_models=false, and raises_assurance=false.

clauses.text: Reviewer lanes find bugs, regressions, missing tests, and overclaims; they do not repair their own findings without a separate repair packet.
clauses.validation_note: Team receipts should identify reviewer/verifier roles separately from worker repair packets.
